description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton labeled 'Faragello Mango Premium Drink', featuring vibrant blue and orange colors with images of juicy mango cubes and green leaves. The front and back panels display the product name in bold white and yellow text, with the brand logo prominently placed at the top. The side panels contain detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and multilingual product descriptions. The packaging is made of a glossy, laminated carton material, likely with an inner foil or plastic lining to preserve freshness. The top of the carton appears to have a small perforated area or tab for opening, but no visible screw cap or spout. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for display in urban retail environments or for on-the-go consumption.
description: A vibrant, rectangular mango juice carton with bold branding, mango imagery, and detailed nutritional panels on the sides.
description_view_0: This side view shows the nutrition facts and ingredients panel in English and French, with a small section of the brand logo visible at the top.
description_view_1: The front view displays the 'Faragello Mango Premium Drink' branding, large mango cube illustrations, and a blue background.
description_view_2: This side view features multilingual product information, including Arabic and French, and additional product certifications and recycling symbols.
description_view_3: The back view is similar to the front but labeled 'Boisson Premium' and also features the mango imagery and branding.
